warnings: SLO remains the canonical error-budget authority. MET emits observations and recommendation signals only.
consumed_ratio and budget_status are read from SLO. When fields are absent, MET reports them as unknown.
failure_prevented: Reliability posture degradation going un-surfaced because MET refuses to emit a freeze recommendation signal even when SLO is breached.
signal_improved: Per-window error budget observation is reported with consumed_ratio, budget_status, and a recommended_input that points at SLO/CDE/SEL — never at MET.

budget_observations.next_recommended_input: Retrieve SLO consumed_ratio and budget_status for the 30d window.
budget_observations.failure_prevented: Budget posture remaining invisible when SLO record is partial.
budget_observations.signal_improved: Unknown stays unknown — no fake green budget.

budget_observations.next_recommended_input: Retrieve SLO consumed_ratio and budget_status for the 7d window.
budget_observations.failure_prevented: Short-window degradation hidden by absent SLO fields.
budget_observations.signal_improved: Per-window state is explicit and unknown when fields are missing.
